title: Optimized Utilities
description: I have a bunch of optimizations and more - I'm kinda obsessed over them, but I also included some quality of life mods that I use ALL THE TIME.
body:
I love optimizations - My friend tells me too much. So here I've included the optimization mods I use every time I play, including some utility mods that I don't think I'd be able to play without.

To provide feedback/report crashing or bugs, join the Discord!

UPDATES:
I will update this modpack quite regularly - Mainly when I add new mods or when the mods in the modpack are several versions behind. When new versions come out, expect to wait around 2 weeks to give the most essential mods time to update.

MOD ATTRIBUTION:
Go to Versions and click on the one you want to download - All the mods used will be shown [there](https://modrinth.com/modpack/optimized-utilities/versions), since there's wayyy too many to include without adding like 800 words to this, which would be way too big.

LINKS:
My Youtube Channel: https://www.youtube.com/@zephyrus-gaming
Bare PVP: [https://modrinth.com/modpack/effciently-optimized](https://modrinth.com/modpack/bare-pvp)
